title: Dekton 7 PC Black Hex Key Set | Ball Point Heads for Up to 25° Angles | Heat Treated for Strength | Ideal for Precision Fastening | Handy Key Holder Included | Includes Sizes 1.5mm to 10mm
features: Versatile Ball Point Heads: Each hex key in the Dekton 7 PC Black Hex Key Set features ball point heads, allowing for use at angles up to 25°, making it easier to access hard-to-reach fasteners and perform precision tasks with ease.

Heat-Treated Durability: Crafted from high-quality materials and heat-treated for added strength, these hex keys are built to withstand heavy use and provide long-lasting performance, ensuring reliability for both DIY projects and professional work.

Comprehensive Size Range: This set includes a range of sizes from 1.5mm to 10mm, covering most common hex key needs for various applications, whether you're working on electronics, furniture assembly, or mechanical repairs.

Ideal for Precision Fastening: Designed for precision fastening, the set ensures a secure fit in fasteners, minimizing the risk of slipping or stripping, and providing accurate and efficient results for your projects.

Convenient Key Holder: The handy key holder included with the set keeps all the hex keys organized and easily accessible, reducing the risk of misplacing individual tools and making it simple to find the right size for the job.
description: The Dekton 7 PC Black Hex Key Set is designed for both precision and durability. Featuring ball point heads, these hex keys allow use at angles up to 25°, making it easier to reach fasteners in tight or awkward spaces. The set includes sizes ranging from 1.5mm to 10mm, providing versatility for a wide range of applications from electronics to mechanical repairs. Each key is heat-treated for enhanced strength and resilience, ensuring long-lasting performance even under heavy use. The set comes with a convenient key holder to keep the hex keys organized and within easy reach, reducing the chance of losing or misplacing them. Ideal for precision fastening, this set delivers reliable and efficient results for all your DIY and professional needs.
